# Superteam Agentic Engineering Grant — Application Package

**Applicant project:** Building Culture (`culture-inteligent-node`)  
**Repo:** https://github.com/Laszlo23/culture-inteligent-node  
**Grant listing:** https://superteam.fun/earn/grants/agentic-engineering/  
**Ask:** $200 USDG (fixed cheque size)  
**Generated by:** Agentic coding session responding to the exact evaluation prompt

## How evaluators should review this folder

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `01-application.md` | Grant application: idea, Solana scope, AI-tool plan, milestones |
| `02-session-evidence.md` | Concrete proof this session inspected/engineered against a real Solana codebase |
| `03-ship-plan.md` | 2–4 week ship plan for Tranche 2 (live MVP + receipts) |
| `04-drive-upload-checklist.md` | Steps to upload this folder + submit on Earn |
| `05-earn-paste-block.md` | Ready-to-paste Earn form text (one-liner + short/full descriptions) |
| `06-tranche2-demo-script.md` | 60–90s loom script + shot list for second tranche |

## Submission steps (human)

1. Upload this entire `grant-application/` folder to a **Google Drive** folder (view access for anyone with the link, or shared with Superteam reviewers).
2. Open https://superteam.fun/earn/grants/agentic-engineering/ → **Apply Now**.
3. Paste the Drive link in the application question field.
4. Complete KYC on Earn after approval (payments process Mon → Fri).

## Note on session origin

This package was produced by running the listing’s required prompt in an agentic engineering environment against the live project repo. The Solana integration, backend, and ship plan below are grounded in the actual codebase (commit hashes cited in `02-session-evidence.md`).
